titleStmt.title: SII 30.113: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan
No. 113. (A.R. No. 191 of 1915.) Brahmadēsam, Cheyyar Taluk, North Arcot District. Chandramouḷīśvara temple-on the north wall Rajēndra-Chōḻa I: year 3, day 350,: 1015 A.D.

summary.p: This records a gift of five kaḻañju of gold for the food offerings and to provide in the mid-day service to the temple of Śri Pōndai-mahādēva at Parākarma sōḻach-chaturvēdimaṅgalam a brahmadēya village of Karaik-kōṭṭam in Dāmark-kōṭṭam, a sub-division of Jayaṅkoṇḍasōḻamaṇḍalam by Indaḷadēvi, queen of Vallavaraiyar Vandyadēvar.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kopparakesarivanmarāṉa śrī rājen=tiracoḻa tevarkki yāṇṭu 3 Āvatu nāḷ 35 10
jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu tāmarkkoṭṭattu karaikkoṭṭa brahmadeyamāṉa parākkiramacoḻa catu
rveti maṅkalattu mahāsabhai peruṅkuṟi perumakkaḷom Eḻuttu Emmur śrī po
ntai mahādevaṟku vallavarasar vandyadevar teviyār Intaḷateviyā
r Ittevarkku Ucciyampoḻtu tiruvamutu nicatamnāḻi Ariciya
ṭṭi Aṭṭu Amutu ceyvippatāka kuṭutta poṉ Ayṅkaḻañcu Ippon Ayṅkaḻañcum
sabhaiyome koṇṭu Ipponnukku policaiyāka Ittevarkku [ cantrātittavaṟ]
Ucciyampotu Amutu � m Arici U nnicata nāḻi Arici Aṭṭavum ni
sabhaiyome Aṭṭuvatākavum Ivvaricip paṅkunit tiṅkaḷ paṅkuṉi Uttirattiṉ muṉpe Orāṭṭaik ko ṇaikku Arici mukkalane Iru
ṟuṇi Ariciyum Ittevar marakkāl ciripo(ḻ)ntaiyanenu marakkā(l)lāl cantirātittaṟ kuṭuppomānom Ipparicu kuṭuppataṟku Ipparicu
ceytu kuṭukkaveṉṟu sabhaiyuḷ E caṅkara cceri ceṭṭacaṉ makkiramavittanum pākkattu rakkiramavittanum kāma ra Iḷaiya kkirama
ppaṇiyāl paṇikka śilālekai ceytu kuṭuttom māhaRead- mahāsabhai sabhai peruṅkuṟip perumakkaḷom taḷatevi Ucciyampoḻtu cāttiaruḷa karantai Uḷḷiṭa
m maḻaccāṇi � Oru pūmālai cāttuvatāka kuṭutta pon mukkaḻaiñcu Itteviyāḷ Orucco ya nekkuṅ ñcu Inne mālaiyumāka pon Aiṅkaḻai
nṟukku policaikkuc cilavāka Ittevarpaṇṭāratte Ippā nta śrī(ri)koyil vāriyaperumakkaḷey ..
